deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr Devine
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Double-carrying apartment and mortgage. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Realistic market value $350K-$400K, mortgage payoff $493K.

logs.m: Stopped by property. Landscaper scheduled. Still need showing feedback.
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn service referrals received.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K.
